description: harness-rails — operational safety rails (pipeline preflight + phase review on Bash; ssh fanout canonical check on Write/Edit; self-check reminder + vastai create 30min followup on PostToolUse Bash)

hooks.command: test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/pipeline_preflight_gate.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-rails hooks/pipeline_preflight_gate.sh

test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/phase_review_gate.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-rails hooks/phase_review_gate.sh

test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/ssh_fanout_canonical_check.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-rails hooks/ssh_fanout_canonical_check.sh

test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/self_check_reminder.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-rails hooks/self_check_reminder.sh

test -x "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" && grep -Fqx '# HARNESS_HOOK_DISPATCHER_ID=claude-harness/v1' "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" 2>/dev/null || exec bash "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/vastai_create_followup_check.sh"; exec "${HOME}/.local/bin/harness-hook" harness-rails hooks/vastai_create_followup_check.sh
